steps.title: Isolate C
steps.content:
Start with the given equation:
$$P=N(34-C)$$
Since $N$ is positive, divide both sides by $N$:
$$\frac{P}{N}=34-C$$
Move terms to solve for $C$:
$$C=34-\frac{P}{N}$$

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The expression $34-\frac{P}{N}$ isolates $C$ completely in terms of the other variables. That matches the correct answer, D, so D is correct.
